title: Will Marvel Studios officially announce Robert Downey Jr. as the actor portraying Doctor Doom for the upcoming Avengers film at San Diego Comic-Con 2024?
resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if Marvel Studios officially confirms (via Marvel Studios Hall H presentation or official press release) on or before 2024-07-31 that Robert Downey Jr. will play Victor von Doom (Doctor Doom) in an upcoming Marvel Cinematic Universe Avengers film. Otherwise NO.
context_hint: Marvel Studios is scheduled to present at San Diego Comic-Con Hall H on July 27, 2024. Industry rumors and tracking discussions have circulated about a major casting reveal. Robert Downey Jr. previously played Tony Stark / Iron Man in the MCU through 2019.
notes_for_evaluation: Market resolved YES on July 27, 2024 when Marvel Studios announced RDJ as Doctor Doom at SDCC Hall H, with the title 'Avengers: Doomsday' subsequently confirmed.
